headline: CoStar Data Shows Midlands Big-Box Market Reaches Turning Point as Supply Starts to Fall
summary: LONDON, April 24, 2026--Big-box warehouse supply across the Midlands has begun to fall after the turn-of-the-year peak, according to data from CoStar, a global leading provider of online real estate marketplaces, information and analytics in the property markets.

headline: CoStar Data Shows Midlands Big-Box Warehouse Supply Falls By 5M Sq Ft From Peak, Pipeline Down 40% As Demand Strengthens
